title: Riptide Fix (Multiplayer Safe)
description: Fixes the high drag experienced when using Riptide with Depth Strider. Multiplayer safe!
body:
# Riptide Fix (Multiplayer Safe)
**Riptide Fix** eliminates the high drag experienced when using Riptide with Depth Strider ([MC-136249](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC/issues/MC-136249)).

The mod is **safe for multiplayer**. It automatically activates when playing on a server that has the mod installed, and it disables itself when playing on servers that don't have it, ensuring you can riptide safely on servers without the mod.
